# Mock API

## Creating a mock

Create a mock for the provided object.

This does not change the object, but returns a mock object to set expectations on the object's methods.

## Methods

* [expects][expects]
* [restore][restore]
* [verify][verify]

## Properties

* [expectations][expectations]

[expectations]: ./expectations.md
